# dashboard

> Generated repo-genome view. Canonical architectural intent lives in `repo_genome/units/*.yaml`.

- Domain: `parcel-ops`
- Layer: `presentation`
- Owner: `ops-team`
- Stability: `evolving`
- Maturity: `prototype`

## Summary

Streamlit dashboard for the Parcel Ops Control Tower. Renders the lane matrix (8 lanes), KPI strip (6 cards), exceptions-first section, and data freshness grid. All domain logic is imported from parcel_schema.py; app.py is display only.

## Primary Files

- `app.py`
- `parcel_schema.py`

## Tests

- (none)

## Validation Commands

- `streamlit run app.py --server.headless true`
- `python -c "from parcel_schema import LANES; assert len(LANES) == 8"`

## Risk Tags

- `synthetic-data`
- `no-auth`
- `single-page`
